notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson hit by pitch. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Colt Keith to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter hits a grand slam (12) to right center field. Kevin McGonigle scores. Colt Keith scores. Spencer Torkelson scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña singles on a line drive to center fielder James Outman. Yainer Diaz scores. Christian Vázquez to 3rd. Jeremy Peña to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder James Outman.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jahmai Jones called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach McKinstry to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Jeremy Peña scores. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith reaches on a fielder's choice. Kevin McGonigle to 2nd. Kevin McGonigle advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Jose Altuve.
